untranslatable_reason: Signal requires ranking stocks by historical volatility and allocating to deciles (D1 vs D10). This is a cross-sectional portfolio construction rule that cannot be expressed as a single-stock technical indicator condition. The rule needs decile-based portfolio formation logic (top/bottom 10% by hvol_20 across a universe), which is outside the scope of per-bar indicator comparisons. Backtest engine must implement custom decile ranking logic at the portfolio level rather than individual entry/exit conditions.
translation_notes: SSRN_980865_15 is a volatility dispersion/low-vol anomaly strategy. The historical volatility calculations (shown in the source data) span 1986-1995 with decile rebalancing. Implementation requires: (1) Calculate hvol_20 or equivalent for all stocks in universe, (2) Rank by volatility, (3) Form long portfolio from D1 (lowest 10%), (4) Form short portfolio from D10 (highest 10%), (5) Rebalance monthly. The conditions shown are placeholder logic only and cannot capture true signal intent without custom portfolio ranking.
